objections.description: Global Cmd/Ctrl+K hijacking lacks input context detection. Intercepts shortcuts when user is typing in forms, contentEditable regions, or browser dev tools, breaking native text editing workflows and accessibility.
objections.suggested_fix: Add activeElement check: if (['INPUT', 'TEXTAREA'].includes(document.activeElement.tagName) || document.activeElement.isContentEditable) return; Also respect event.isComposing for IME input.

objections.description: Unbounded DOM node rendering for graph visualization. With normative datasets exceeding 500 refs, this causes forced reflows >100ms and memory exhaustion on mobile devices.
objections.suggested_fix: Implement canvas-based rendering (e.g., force-graph) or virtualization. Cap initial render to 50 nodes and require explicit filter expansion with performance warnings.

objections.description: Static markdown lacks automated validation against source AST. Will diverge from implementation within one sprint, creating misleading onboarding documentation.
objections.suggested_fix: Generate via CI pipeline using ts-morph or tree-sitter to extract actual module boundaries. Fail build if generated content differs from committed file.

suggestions.description: Add debounced search with AbortController cancellation. Current inline top results likely perform synchronous filtering on large document indices, blocking the main thread.

Add relationship confidence UI layer. Since validity is heuristic, render unverified normative_refs with dashed edges or reduced opacity to prevent users from trusting speculative relationships as ground truth.
